allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('API_URL',''\), d.get\('ANON_KEY',''\), d.get\('SERVICE_ROLE_KEY',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK' if 'access_token' in d else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK — token received' if 'access_token' in d else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK — signed in as', d.get\('user',{}\).get\('email','?'\)\) if 'access_token' in d else print\('FAIL:', d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK — signed in as', d.get\('user',{}\).get\('email'\)\) if 'access_token' in d else print\('FAIL:', d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('signup ok, id:', d.get\('id','?'\)\) if 'id' in d else print\('FAIL:', d\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; mounts=[m for m in d['Mounts'] if 'function' in m.get\('Source',''\).lower\(\) or 'function' in m.get\('Destination',''\).lower\(\)]; print\(json.dumps\(mounts, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); env={e.split\('='\)[0]:e.split\('=',1\)[1] for e in d[0]['Config']['Env'] if '=' in e}; print\('JWT_SECRET:', env.get\('JWT_SECRET',''\)[:60]\); print\('SERVICE_KEY:', env.get\('SERVICE_KEY',''\)[:100]\); print\('ANON_KEY:', env.get\('ANON_KEY',''\)[:100]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); env={e.split\('='\)[0]:e.split\('=',1\)[1] for e in d[0]['Config']['Env'] if '=' in e}; [print\(k+':', v\) for k,v in env.items\(\) if 'JWT' in k or 'SECRET' in k or 'KEY' in k]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); env={e.split\('='\)[0]:e.split\('=',1\)[1] for e in d[0]['Config']['Env'] if '=' in e}; [print\(k+':', v[:80]\) for k,v in env.items\(\) if 'JWT' in k or 'SECRET' in k or 'KEY' in k or 'URL' in k]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); env={e.split\('='\)[0]:e.split\('=',1\)[1] for e in d[0]['Config']['Env'] if '=' in e}; [print\(k+':', v\) for k,v in sorted\(env.items\(\)\)]")
